name: Short Sword
description: Short Swords are balanced for both attack and defense. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.

name: Long Sword
description: Long Swords are both long-ranged and effective. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.

name: Spear
description: Spears allow for attacks to be made from afar. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.

name: Axe/Hammer
description: Battle axes/hammers are overwhelmingly powerful. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.

name: Dual Blades
description: Dual Blades concentrate on combat effectiveness. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.

name: Fist
description: Skill needed to use your own fists when attacking foes. Higher skill levels increase damage and cut RP used. Also raises maximum RP and STR.
